description.content:
Create an API Token. The API Token created must use a subset of permissions the API token creating them.

This endpoint consumes 10 units of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- api-tokens:create

response.name: The newly created api token with its stable UUID and hash.

description.content:
List all API Tokens.

This endpoint consumes 10 units of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- api-tokens:list

query.description: Specify the maximum number of results to return per page.
The token specifying which page to return.
Whether to include token values in response. Use "omit" to exclude tokens entirely.

response.name: The paginated array of API tokens for the organization, and related metadata.
